# Minnie — allow all crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap (generated by @astrojs/sitemap at build time).
# NOTE: crawlers read robots.txt from the domain root. On the current
# github.io project-subpath this lives at /minnie-landing/robots.txt; it
# becomes effective at the root once you move to the custom domain.
# Update this URL when the domain changes.
Sitemap: https://pratik-singh-web.github.io/minnie-landing/sitemap-index.xml
